summary.regressionSchedule: continuous quality cadence defined with daily smoke, weekly critical suite and monthly full regression
summary.technicalDebtBacklog: technical debt prioritization model defined with severity, impact and effort scoring plus release gate policy
summary.monthlyHealthReview: monthly health review ritual defined with operational KPIs, residual risks and remediation ownership

regressionCadence.name: daily-smoke
regressionCadence.scope: auth, onboarding, training, nutrition, runtime status

regressionCadence.name: monthly-full
regressionCadence.scope: full workspace checks + release gate rehearsal

debtPrioritization.releasePolicy: no release if open debt items with severity=critical and no mitigation

outputs: owner + due date for each remediation
